HMS Dragon sets sail from Portsmouth and heads to CyprusThe UK has deployed the Type 45 Destroyer to the Mediterranean region, after an Iranian drone struck the runway at the RAF Akrotiri base in Cyprus on 1 March. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cjeng582d13o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cjeng582d13o#0 Tue, 10 Mar 2026 16:47:23 GMT
An 'epidemic' of violence: The women and girls killed by men last yearWe tracked reports and contacted police and prosecutors for a deeper look at the situation across UK. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cg5nelp5enpo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cg5nelp5enpo#0 Tue, 10 Mar 2026 06:00:04 GMT
Eni Aluko wins Joey Barton libel case over X postsBarton is told to pay the former England footballer more than £300k over two posts he made in 2024. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8eg2n83y1eo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8eg2n83y1eo#0 Tue, 10 Mar 2026 13:27:46 GMT
Simpson and guide Poth win Paralympic silver for GBNeil Simpson and his guide Rob Poth win Great Britain's first medal of the Milan-Cortina Winter Paralympics with silver in the alpine combined. https://www.bbc.com/sport/articles/c1l7y1vq02yo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/articles/c1l7y1vq02yo#0 Tue, 10 Mar 2026 13:09:09 GMT
Italy buys rare Caravaggio portrait for €30mThe purchase is part of wider plans to prevent major artworks from being bought by private collectors. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c93j2ekgwqko?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c93j2ekgwqko#0 Tue, 10 Mar 2026 15:18:00 GMT
Inmate charged with murder of Soham killer Ian HuntleyA prison inmate has been charged with the murder of Soham killer Ian Huntley, police say. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg8ll4l7d9o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg8ll4l7d9o#0 Tue, 10 Mar 2026 12:03:44 GMT
U-turn by Streeting sees senior midwife Ockenden appointed to chair maternity inquiryDonna Ockenden is appointed to lead the maternity services inquiry at Leeds hospitals. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c9v0xmngy9jo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c9v0xmngy9jo#0 Tue, 10 Mar 2026 16:51:37 GMT

Court hears millions of PlayStation players charged unfair download feesThe console maker is accused of charging fans "excessive" fees to obtain software from its official store. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c043y6rr7z3o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c043y6rr7z3o#0 Tue, 10 Mar 2026 15:19:28 GMT
England star Kyle Walker retires from international football three months before World CupExperienced England defender Kyle Walker retires from international football with immediate effect. https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/cpv83g4dpgeo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/cpv83g4dpgeo#0 Tue, 10 Mar 2026 15:30:17 GMT
